formulas.name: ExtractedDomain
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Website}), NULL, IF( LEFT( IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Website}, "://"), MID( {!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, IF( CONTAINS(MID({!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, LEN({!$Record.Website})), "/"), FIND("/", MID({!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, LEN({!$Record.Website}))) - 1, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) - 2 ) ), IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Website}, "/"), LEFT({!$Record.Website}, FIND("/", {!$Record.Website}) - 1), {!$Record.Website} ) ), 4 ) = "www.", MID( IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Website}, "://"), MID( {!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, IF( CONTAINS(MID({!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, LEN({!$Record.Website})), "/"), FIND("/", MID({!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, LEN({!$Record.Website}))) - 1, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) - 2 ) ), IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Website}, "/"), LEFT({!$Record.Website}, FIND("/", {!$Record.Website}) - 1), {!$Record.Website} ) ), 5, 255 ), IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Website}, "://"), MID( {!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, IF( CONTAINS(MID({!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, LEN({!$Record.Website})), "/"), FIND("/", MID({!$Record.Website}, FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) + 3, LEN({!$Record.Website}))) - 1, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - FIND("://", {!$Record.Website}) - 2 ) ), IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Website}, "/"), LEFT({!$Record.Website}, FIND("/", {!$Record.Website}) - 1), {!$Record.Website} ) ) ) )

Flow.interviewLabel: 取引先メールドメイン抽出 {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: 取引先メールドメイン抽出
